MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, The Anastasia Picaso Intervivos Trust is present. Represented by Becky Gloyd.
Attorney, Marina Franco, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Phyllis Spencer, is present.
Attorney, Misti Schmidt, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amamda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JUN-07-2010 remains on calendar.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PHYLLIS SPENCER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR # 4819 =301/PHA
